abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Lorelei
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is killed by this action, this model may declare the Sever Artery action without draining a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Meat for the Young
triggers.text: An ally within 6" gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

actions.name: Hurl Corpse
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Remains marker within 2" of itself. If a Remains marker was removed, deal +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Vengeance Incarnate
triggers.text: Place this model within 6". Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Blacken the Skies
actions.costs_and_restrictions: All friendly models within (x)2" with this action that have already activated this turn may declare this action. Place this model within range. This model may not declare the Interact action this activation.

triggers.name: Blood for Blood
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to this model. Any enemy models within range of the Black Blood (x) that cannot gain an Injured token because they already have one are dealt 1 damage.
